summary: The footage captures a highway scene with multiple vehicles traveling in both directions. A large truck dominates the left side of the road, while smaller cars move alongside it. Road signs and infrastructure such as poles and billboards are visible along the roadside.

events_timeline.event: Multiple vehicles are seen traveling on the highway, including a large truck and several smaller cars.

uncertainties: Exact positions and velocities of all vehicles cannot be determined due to limited visibility.
Text on the billboard sign is unreadable.

risk_assessment.why: There are no apparent collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between vehicles.
